message:
conformance(io): broaden packet009 parser/memmap/archive fixtures across differential/metamorphic/adversarial suites (bd-16wj)

Porting-to-Rust parity expansion for FNP-P2C-009:
- differential: +5 cases (bool dtype decode, copy-on-write memmap budget edge, archive member/retry limits edge, f32 payload footprint check, explicit unknown-prefix dispatch rejection path)
- metamorphic: +4 cases (fortran+i32 header descriptor roundtrip, npy dispatch stability, archive budget idempotence at max-member/max-retry edge, strict high-risk policy metadata idempotence)
- adversarial: +5 cases (wrong 8-byte magic prefix, write-mode memmap zero-byte footprint guard, dispatch-retry overflow, object-dtype read payload guard, hardened unknown-class fail-closed)

Validation:
- jq empty + count checks on all modified io fixture files
- rch exec -- cargo test -p fnp-conformance io_ -- --nocapture
- rch exec -- cargo run -p fnp-conformance --bin run_test_contract_gate
- rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets
- rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
- rch exec -- cargo fmt --check
- UBS_MAX_DIR_SIZE_MB=0 ubs --diff

files.patch:
@@ -193,5 +193,89 @@
     "reason_code": "io_policy_unknown_metadata",
     "mode_raw": "strict",
     "class_raw": "legacy_semantics"

+    "severity": "high",
+    "seed": 913,

+    "expected_error_contains": "write memmap requires non-empty expected byte footprint",
+    "expected_reason_code": "io_memmap_contract_violation",
+    "severity": "high",
+    "seed": 914,
+    "env_fingerprint": "linux-x86_64-rust2024",
+    "artifact_refs": [

+    "memmap_mode": "w+",
+    "dtype_descr": "<f8",
+    "file_len_bytes": 1024,
+    "expected_bytes": 0,
+    "validation_retries": 0

+  {
+    "id": "io_npz_dispatch_retries_exceeded",
+    "operation": "npz_archive_budget",

+    "seed": 915,
+    "env_fingerprint": "linux-x86_64-rust2024",
+    "artifact_refs": [

+  {
+    "id": "io_read_payload_object_dtype_requires_pickle_path",
+    "operation": "read_payload",
+    "expected_error_contains": "object dtype payload requires pickle/object decode path",

+    "severity": "high",
+    "seed": 916,
+    "env_fingerprint": "linux-x86_64-rust2024",
+    "artifact_refs": [
+      "artifacts/contracts/security_control_checks_v1.yaml",
+      "artifacts/phase2c/FNP-P2C-009/unit_property_evidence.json"
+    ],
+    "reason_code": "io_read_payload_incomplete",
+    "shape": [2],
+    "dtype_descr": "|O",
+    "payload_len_bytes": 16
+  },
+  {
+    "id": "io_policy_unknown_class_hardened_fail_closed",
+    "operation": "policy_metadata",
+    "expected_error_contains": "unknown mode/class metadata rejected fail-closed",
+    "expected_reason_code": "io_policy_unknown_metadata",
+    "severity": "critical",
+    "seed": 917,
+    "env_fingerprint": "linux-x86_64-rust2024",
+    "artifact_refs": [
+      "artifacts/contracts/security_control_checks_v1.yaml",
+      "artifacts/contracts/hardened_mode_allowlist_v1.yaml"
+    ],
+    "reason_code": "io_policy_unknown_metadata",
+    "mode_raw": "hardened",
+    "class_raw": "legacy_semantics"
   }
 ]
